data.body: Epic complete: all 17 child bugs closed; each fix landed on main (e.g. 9a94d2c reducer UUID dedup, 0ee231e empty-title/element-contract, 4e0ff03 case-insensitive readonly gate, 99dc960 archived-revert un-archive, e68cb96 graph-cache mtime key, a6e31cf exclude_deleted on lib+MCP, b31ccc0 unarchive seam + verdict-hash help). No open descendants remain. Closing.
